Genuine quality
Official website latest FENDI hand-stitched Togo leather cat bag
New Peekaboo cat bag, only to see a different side of you. The new design continues the classic Peekaboo trapezoidal silhouette and square turnlock design, with a fan design on the side, full of a sense of high class! Every stitch is extremely skillful! Original custom!
Size 27x21x9.5cm. Style No.: 302

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot M14017 Monogram】 The Louis Vuitton Noé Cargo bucket bag is constructed with Monogram canvas and features vintage leather trim, inheriting the Noé bucket bag designed in 1932 to carry champagne bottles. The wide front pocket and exquisite details pay homage to Louis Vuitton's long history while meeting modern needs. The top handle and shoulder strap are both detachable for flexible portability. 24 x 16 x 22 cm (Height x Width x Length)
items.name_cn: 【Exclusive Real Shot M14017 Monogram】 The Louis Vuitton Noé Cargo bucket bag is constructed with Monogram canvas and features vintage leather trim, inheriting the Noé bucket bag designed in 1932 to carry champagne bottles. The wide front pocket and exquisite details pay homage to Louis Vuitton's long history while meeting modern needs. The top handle and shoulder strap are both detachable for flexible portability. 24 x 16 x 22 cm (Height x Width x Length)

items.name_en: Top Quality Original M14526 ✨Supports NXP Chip 163 Dynamic Chip❤️ The Trunkie handbag combines Monogram canvas and metal rivets, paired with metal-textured corners and the iconic S-lock, showcasing the brand's heritage with a vintage suitcase style. The interior space and zip pocket make it convenient to hold daily essentials, and the sliding-chain shoulder strap offers versatile carrying options.

items.name_en: 🔮🔮🔮OHANEL🚩🚩🚩Vintage Calfskin Custom Leather, super retro in person. My favorite autumn/winter suede Chanel. It's firmly number one in my heart because it's so unique and rare. Chocolate brown with double pockets and a chain strap. This was the first Chanel that attracted me to the brand. It gathers all the suede styles I love. Crossbody tote, adjustable chain ⛓️. These five major elements appear in many similar styles, but this suede brown is the one that hits me the most. The leather looks like cowhide texture but feels like thick matte suede. The chain allows for a shoulder bag style. Lightweight, fits a laptop + iPad! Dimensions: 28x12.5x24cm

items.name_cn:
#D-Vibe East-West Micro Bag 'Monogram with Leather'
This D-Vibe East-West Micro Bag is a new addition to the 2025 Spring-Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, offering a modern silhouette that enriches the D-Vibe line. Crafted with care from materials like blue Oblique print fabric, it highlights the Oblique print and is accented with smooth calfskin details. A practical style with a slip pocket for easy storage of daily essentials, featuring a top leather handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
Zip closure
1 compartment
Internal slip pocket
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap
Model: 2388
Dimensions: 20.5 x 13 x 5 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 card holder, and lipstick

items.name_cn:
#Medium Signature Tote Bag 'Pink'
This Signature Tote Bag is a new addition to the 2025 Spring-Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, highlighting a soft silhouette and versatile design. Crafted from pink calfskin with tonal grained calfskin details, it features a vintage gold-finish metal Christian Dior Paris logo on the front. A spacious compartment with a snap button and leather strap closure safely holds daily essentials, with a slip pocket for added refinement. The medium style comes with a top leather handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap for easy hand, shoulder, or crossbody carrying.
Calfskin metal snap button and leather strap closure
Top leather handle
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap
Internal slip pocket
Model: 2366
Dimensions: 24x21x14cm (LxHxW)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 wallet, 2 card holders, sunglasses, and lipstick

items.name_cn:
#Small Signature Bucket Bag in Pink
This Signature bucket bag is a new arrival from the 2025 Spring/Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, highlighting a soft silhouette and versatile design. Crafted from pink calfskin, it features tonal pebbled leather details and a vintage gold-finish metal Christian Dior Paris logo on the front. The spacious compartment features a snap closure and leather strap opening, offering a secure place for daily essentials, with an interior pocket for added refinement. The small size comes with a top leather handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, allowing for easy carrying by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.
Metal snap closure and leather strap opening; top leather handle
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap; interior pocket
Model: 2366
Dimensions: 21×19×11cm (L×H×W)
Fits 1 smartphone, 1 wallet, 2 card holders, sunglasses, and lipstick

#Medium Signature Bucket Bag in Black
This Signature bucket bag is a new arrival from the 2025 Spring/Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, highlighting a soft silhouette and versatile design. Crafted from black calfskin, it features tonal pebbled leather details and a vintage gold-finish metal Christian Dior Paris logo on the front. The spacious compartment features a snap closure and leather strap opening, offering a secure place for daily essentials, with an interior pocket for added refinement. The medium size comes with a top leather handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, allowing for easy carrying by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.
Metal snap closure and leather strap opening; top leather handle
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap; interior pocket
Model: 2366
Dimensions: 24×21×14cm (L×H×W)
Fits 1 smartphone, 1 wallet, 2 card holders, sunglasses, and lipstick

items.name_cn:
#Medium Signature Bucket Bag in Grey
This Signature Bucket Bag is a new arrival from the 2025 Spring/Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, featuring a soft silhouette and versatile design. Crafted from grey calfskin, it is accented with matching grained calfskin details and a vintage gold-finish metal Christian Dior Paris logo on the front. The spacious compartment features a snap closure and leather strap opening, with an interior slip pocket for added refinement. The medium size comes with a top leather handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, allowing for easy carrying by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.
Calfskin metal snap and leather strap closure
Top leather handle
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap
Interior slip pocket
Model: 2366
Dimensions: 24x21x14 cm (LxHxW)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 wallet, 2 card holders, sunglasses, and lipstick
